title: SceneScores
description: Output of 01_2_scene_scoring: per-beat CLIP-similarity ranking of the downloader stage's clips. Deliberately carries NO source/origin/url/license for any clip (the downloader lane is source-free by design) - only a neutral clip_id, a file_ref to locate the clip, and its fit score/rank.

ranked_clips.description: Clips that yielded at least one usable frame, sorted by score descending, rank 1 = best fit for this beat. Empty if no clip could be frame-sampled.

score.description: Mean CLIP cosine similarity across the clip's sampled frames vs. the beat's visual_description.

trim_in_s.description: Proposed best-fit trim window start (seconds into the clip), centered on this beat's highest-scoring sampled frame. Present only when the clip's duration is known. Consumed by 07_2_narration_shot_mapping.

trim_out_s.description: Proposed best-fit trim window end (seconds into the clip). trim_out_s - trim_in_s is ~the pacing shot length (4-5s).
